mapper.select: SELECT CASE_ID AS "caseId", SECTION_CODE AS "sectionCode", CASE_CODE AS "caseCode", MAJOR_CODE AS "majorCode", SECTION_LABEL AS "sectionLabel", SOURCE_FILE_NM AS "sourceFileName", SOURCE_PATH AS "sourcePath", TARGET_PATH AS "targetPath", CASE_STATUS AS "caseStatus", ROW_COUNT AS "rowCount", ROW_SCHEMA_JSON AS "rowSchemaJson", GUIDANCE_JSON AS "guidanceJson", LAST_SAVED_BY AS "lastSavedBy", TO_CHAR(LAST_SAVED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "savedAt" FROM ADMIN_EMISSION_SURVEY_CASE ORDER BY MAJOR_CODE, SECTION_CODE, CASE_CODE

SELECT CASE_ROW_ID AS "caseRowId", CASE_ID AS "caseId", ROW_ORDR AS "rowOrder", ROW_KEY AS "rowKey", ROW_VALUES_JSON AS "rowValuesJson" FROM ADMIN_EMISSION_SURVEY_CASE_ROW WHERE CASE_ID = #{_parameter} AND USE_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY ROW_ORDR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADMIN_EMISSION_SURVEY_CASE ( CASE_ID, SECTION_CODE, CASE_CODE, MAJOR_CODE, SECTION_LABEL, SOURCE_FILE_NM, SOURCE_PATH, TARGET_PATH, CASE_STATUS, ROW_COUNT, ROW_SCHEMA_JSON, GUIDANCE_JSON, LAST_SAVED_BY, LAST_SAVED_AT, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{caseId}, #{sectionCode}, #{caseCode}, #{majorCode}, #{sectionLabel}, #{sourceFileName}, #{sourcePath}, #{targetPath}, #{caseStatus}, #{rowCount}, #{rowSchemaJson}, #{guidanceJson}, #{actorId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{actorId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{actorId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ADMIN_EMISSION_SURVEY_CASE SET MAJOR_CODE = #{majorCode}, SECTION_LABEL = #{sectionLabel}, SOURCE_FILE_NM = #{sourceFileName}, SOURCE_PATH = #{sourcePath}, TARGET_PATH = #{targetPath}, CASE_STATUS = #{caseStatus}, ROW_COUNT = #{rowCount}, ROW_SCHEMA_JSON = #{rowSchemaJson}, GUIDANCE_JSON = #{guidanceJson}, LAST_SAVED_BY = #{actorId}, LAST_SAVED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{actorId} WHERE SECTION_CODE = #{sectionCode} AND CASE_CODE = #{caseCode}
